dict.string: So you can pick your photos for this week's Rollcall!
Locket uses your camera to let you take pictures to share with your friends.
Locket uses Apple Music to let you share your music with your friends.
This allows Locket to give you a better ad experience.
Locket uses your location to let you share your activity with your friends.
Locket uses your photo library to let you save your pictures outside of Locket.
Locket uses Apple Music to let you share your music with your friends.
Locket uses your microphone to let you record video to share with your friends.
Locket uses your location to let you share your location with your friends.
Find friends from your contacts on Locket. Your contacts may be uploaded to a server to help you add your friends.
